UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within a multi-tenant firm, including their role and association with specific companies. Does not store sensitive authentication data like passwords.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, matching Firebase Auth UID.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for communication.

mobile.description: The mobile number of the user.

companyName.description: The name of the user's company.

role.description: The assigned role of the user, defining their access level.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the user account is active or inactive.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this user belongs to. (Relationship: Firm 1:N UserProfile)

companyId.description: Reference to the primary Company this user is associated with, if applicable (e.g., for a ClientUser). (Relationship: Company 1:N UserProfile)

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

firstLogin.description: Flag to indicate if this is the user's first login. Used to show a welcome message.

welcomeTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the user was shown the welcome message.

Firm.title: Firm
Firm.description: Represents a single SaaS tenant (firm) within the accounting system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Firm entity.

firmName.description: The legal name of the firm.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this firm.

planType.description: The current subscription plan (e.g., Free, Basic, Pro).

maxUsers.description: The maximum number of users allowed under the current plan.

maxVouchersPerMonth.description: The maximum number of vouchers that can be created per month.

subscriptionStatus.description: The status of the subscription (e.g., Active, Expired, Canceled, Trial).

renewalDate.description: The date and time when the firm's subscription plan is due for renewal.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the firm's account is currently active.

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the firm record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the firm record was last updated.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a client company managed by a firm in the accounting system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Company entity.

companyName.description: The legal name of the client company.

gstin.description: Goods and Services Tax Identification Number (GSTIN) for the company.

address.description: The registered address of the company.

financialYearStart.description: The start date of the company's financial year.

financialYearEnd.description: The end date of the company's financial year.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm that manages this company. (Relationship: Firm 1:N Company)

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the company record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the company record was last updated.

Ledger.title: Ledger
Ledger.description: Represents an individual account (Ledger) or a classification category (Group) in the chart of accounts for a company. Groups are used to create a hierarchy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ledger or Group entity.

ledgerName.description: The name of the ledger or group (e.g., 'Cash', 'Sales', 'HDFC Bank').

parentLedgerId.description: Reference to the parent Group this entity belongs to, forming the hierarchy. Null for primary groups.

isGroup.description: If true, this entity is a Group used for classification and cannot have transactions. If false, it is a Ledger.

nature.description: The fundamental accounting nature of the ledger/group, inherited from its top-level parent.

openingBalance.description: The initial balance of the ledger at the start of a financial period. Should be 0 for groups.

balanceType.description: Indicates whether the opening balance is a Debit (Dr) or Credit (Cr).

gstApplicable.description: Indicates if GST is applicable to transactions posted to this ledger.

gstDetails.description: Contains all GST-related information for the ledger.

gstin.description: The GST Identification Number for this party, if applicable.

isBankAccount.description: Flag to indicate if this ledger represents a bank account.

bankDetails.description: Bank account details, applicable if isBankAccount is true.

isCashAccount.description: Flag to indicate if this ledger represents the physical cash account.

contactDetails.description: Contact and address information, typically for parties like Sundry Debtors and Creditors.

isSystem.description: If true, this is a system-generated ledger that cannot be deleted by the user.

status.description: The current status of the ledger.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this ledger belongs to.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this ledger belongs to.

Voucher.title: Voucher
Voucher.description: Represents an accounting transaction entry that maintains double-entry accounting principles.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Voucher entity.

voucherNumber.description: An auto-sequenced unique number for the voucher within a company.

voucherType.description: The type of the voucher (e.g., Sales, Purchase, Payment, Receipt, Journal, Contra).

date.description: The date when the transaction occurred or the voucher was recorded.

partyLedgerId.description: Reference to the Ledger representing the main party involved in the transaction (e.g., Customer, Vendor). (Relationship: Ledger 1:N Voucher)

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the voucher, summing all line items.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this voucher belongs to. (Relationship: Firm 1:N Voucher)

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this voucher belongs to. (Relationship: Company 1:N Voucher)

createdByUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this voucher. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Voucher)

isBalanced.description: A flag indicating if the voucher's debit and credit line items are balanced (total debits equal total credits).

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the voucher record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the voucher record was last updated.

VoucherLineItem.title: VoucherLineItem
VoucherLineItem.description: Represents a single debit or credit entry within an accounting voucher.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VoucherLineItem entity.

voucherId.description: Reference to the Voucher this line item belongs to. (Relationship: Voucher 1:N VoucherLineItem)

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this voucher line item belongs to. Inherited from Voucher.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this voucher line item belongs to. Inherited from Voucher.

ledgerId.description: Reference to the Ledger account affected by this line item. (Relationship: Ledger 1:N VoucherLineItem)

amount.description: The monetary amount of this line item.

taxRate.description: The tax rate applicable to this line item, if any.

taxAmount.description: The calculated tax amount for this line item.

drCrIndicator.description: Indicates whether the entry is a Debit (Dr) or Credit (Cr).

description.description: A brief description for this specific line item.

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the voucher line item record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the voucher line item record was last updated.

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Records all significant user activities and system changes for audit and security purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AuditLog entity.

entityType.description: The type of entity that was affected by the action (e.g., 'Voucher', 'Ledger', 'Company').

entityId.description: The ID of the specific entity instance that was affected.

oldValue.description: JSON string representing the state of the entity before the change.

newValue.description: JSON string representing the state of the entity after the change.

changedByUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who performed the action. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N AuditLog)

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm associated with this audit log entry. (Relationship: Firm 1:N AuditLog)

companyId.description: Reference to the Company associated with this audit log entry, if applicable. (Relationship: Company 1:N AuditLog)

timestamp.description: The date and time when the audited action occurred.

ipAddress.description: The IP address from which the action was initiated.

userAgent.description: The user agent string of the client that initiated the action.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents a GST-compliant invoice generated from a Sales Voucher, with customizable details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

voucherId.description: Reference to the Sales Voucher from which this invoice was generated. (Relationship: Voucher 1:N Invoice)

invoiceDate.description: The date when the invoice was issued.

dueDate.description: The date by which payment for this invoice is due.

partyLedgerId.description: Reference to the Ledger representing the customer or recipient of the invoice. (Relationship: Ledger 1:N Invoice)

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the invoice, including taxes.

totalTaxAmount.description: The total tax amount applied on the invoice.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this invoice belongs to. (Relationship: Firm 1:N Invoice)

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this invoice belongs to. (Relationship: Company 1:N Invoice)

invoiceTemplateId.description: Reference to the InvoiceTemplate used to generate this invoice's presentation. (Relationship: InvoiceTemplate 1:N Invoice)

status.description: The current status of the invoice (e.g., Draft, Issued, Paid, PartiallyPaid, Cancelled).

paymentTerms.description: Textual description of the payment terms (e.g., 'Net 30', 'Due on receipt').

notes.description: Any additional footer notes or special instructions for the invoice.

customFieldsData.description: JSON string containing dynamic custom field data for this invoice, validated against a schema.

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice record was last updated.

InvoiceTemplate.title: InvoiceTemplate
InvoiceTemplate.description: Defines a customizable template for generating invoices, specific to a company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InvoiceTemplate entity.

templateName.description: A descriptive name for the invoice template (e.g., 'Standard GST Invoice Template').

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this invoice template belongs to. (Relationship: Firm 1:N InvoiceTemplate)

companyId.description: Reference to the Company that owns this invoice template. (Relationship: Company 1:N InvoiceTemplate)

logoUrl.description: URL to the company's logo image to be used on the invoice.

colorThemePrimary.description: Hex code for the primary color theme of the invoice.

colorThemeAccent.description: Hex code for the accent color theme of the invoice.

bankDetailsJson.description: JSON string containing bank account details for payment, e.g., {'bankName': 'ABC Bank', 'accountNumber': '12345', 'ifscCode': 'ABCD0001234'}.

footerNotes.description: General footer notes or legal disclaimers to appear on the invoice.

customFieldsSchema.description: JSON schema definition for custom fields that can be added to invoices using this template.

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice template record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice template record was last updated.

CustomFieldDefinition.title: CustomFieldDefinition
CustomFieldDefinition.description: Defines the metadata and schema for custom fields that companies can add to various entities like Invoices or Ledgers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CustomFieldDefinition entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this custom field definition belongs to. (Relationship: Firm 1:N CustomFieldDefinition)

companyId.description: Reference to the Company for which this custom field is defined. (Relationship: Company 1:N CustomFieldDefinition)

entityType.description: The type of entity this custom field applies to (e.g., 'Invoice', 'Ledger').

fieldName.description: The programmatic name of the custom field (e.g., 'deliveryInstructions').

displayName.description: The user-friendly display name of the custom field (e.g., 'Delivery Instructions').

fieldType.description: The type of data expected for this custom field (e.g., 'string', 'number', 'boolean', 'date', 'select').

schemaDefinition.description: JSON string containing a JSON Schema snippet defining the validation rules for this custom field (e.g., {'type': 'string', 'maxLength': 255}).

isRequired.description: Indicates whether this custom field is mandatory for the target entity.

order.description: The display order of the custom field when rendering forms.

defaultValue.description: The default value for this custom field, if any (stored as a string, interpreted based on fieldType).

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the custom field definition record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the custom field definition record was last updated.

BankTransaction.title: BankTransaction
BankTransaction.description: Represents a single financial transaction imported from a bank statement, awaiting reconciliation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BankTransaction entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm this bank transaction belongs to. (Relationship: Firm 1:N BankTransaction)

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this bank transaction belongs to. (Relationship: Company 1:N BankTransaction)

bankAccountId.description: Reference to the BankAccount this transaction originated from (if a BankAccount entity is implemented). (Relationship: BankAccount 1:N BankTransaction)

transactionDate.description: The date of the bank transaction.

description.description: The description of the transaction as provided by the bank.

referenceNumber.description: A unique reference number provided by the bank for the transaction.

amount.description: The monetary amount of the transaction.

transactionType.description: Indicates if the transaction is a DEBIT or CREDIT from the bank account perspective.

sourceFileId.description: Reference to the UploadedBankStatement file from which this transaction was imported. (Relationship: UploadedBankStatement 1:N BankTransaction)

isReconciled.description: Flag indicating whether this bank transaction has been reconciled with an internal accounting entry.

suggestedLedgerId.description: Reference to a Ledger suggested for mapping this transaction to. (Relationship: Ledger 1:N BankTransaction)

actualLedgerId.description: Reference to the Ledger this transaction was actually mapped to after review. (Relationship: Ledger 1:N BankTransaction)

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the bank transaction record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the bank transaction record was last updated.

UploadedBankStatement.title: UploadedBankStatement
UploadedBankStatement.description: Tracks uploaded bank statement files for processing and reconciliation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UploadedBankStatement entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm that uploaded this bank statement. (Relationship: Firm 1:N UploadedBankStatement)

companyId.description: Reference to the Company for which this bank statement was uploaded. (Relationship: Company 1:N UploadedBankStatement)

fileName.description: The original file name of the uploaded bank statement.

fileUrl.description: URL or path to the stored bank statement file.

uploadDate.description: The date and time when the bank statement file was uploaded.

uploadedByUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who uploaded the file. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UploadedBankStatement)

status.description: The current processing status of the uploaded file (e.g., 'UPLOADED', 'PARSED', 'ERROR', 'PROCESSED').

totalTransactions.description: The total number of transactions found and processed in the uploaded file.

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the uploaded bank statement record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the uploaded bank statement record was last updated.

TallyImportJob.title: TallyImportJob
TallyImportJob.description: Manages the process of importing accounting data from Tally XML files into the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TallyImportJob entity.

firmId.description: Reference to the Firm initiating this Tally import. (Relationship: Firm 1:N TallyImportJob)

companyId.description: Reference to the Company for which Tally data is being imported. (Relationship: Company 1:N TallyImportJob)

fileName.description: The original file name of the uploaded Tally XML.

fileUrl.description: URL or path to the stored Tally XML file.

uploadDate.description: The date and time when the Tally XML file was uploaded.

uploadedByUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who uploaded the file. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TallyImportJob)

status.description: The current processing status of the Tally import job (e.g., 'UPLOADED', 'PARSING', 'PENDING_REVIEW', 'COMPLETED', 'ERROR').

importSummary.description: JSON string containing a summary of the import, including counts of imported ledgers, vouchers, and any errors encountered.

isDeleted.description: Flag to indicate if the record is soft-deleted. True for soft-deleted, false otherwise.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the Tally import job record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the Tally import job record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profile information, roles, and firm/company affiliations. `userId` maps to Firebase Authentication's UID. Includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication User ID (UID) of the user.

definition.description: Root collection for each SaaS tenant (accounting firm). All data related to a firm is nested under its respective document. This is the primary multi-tenancy boundary.

params.name: firmId
params.description: Unique identifier for the accounting firm (tenant).

definition.description: Subcollection storing client companies managed by a specific firm. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: Unique identifier for the client company within the firm.

definition.description: Subcollection for the Chart of Accounts, containing both Groups and Ledgers for a specific company. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: ledgerId
params.description: Unique identifier for the ledger account or group.

definition.description: Subcollection for accounting vouchers (transactions) specific to a company. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: voucherId
params.description: Unique identifier for the accounting voucher.

definition.description: Subcollection for individual debit/credit entries within a voucher. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence, inherited from the parent voucher.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the top-level firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: voucherId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent voucher.

params.name: lineItemId
params.description: Unique identifier for the voucher line item.

definition.description: Collection for audit logs specific to a firm, documenting significant user activities and system changes. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' for authorization independence and optional 'companyId'.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: auditLogId
params.description: Unique identifier for the audit log entry.

definition.description: Subcollection for generated invoices specific to a company. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: invoiceId
params.description: Unique identifier for the invoice.

definition.description: Subcollection for customizable invoice templates specific to a company. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: templateId
params.description: Unique identifier for the invoice template.

definition.description: Subcollection for custom field definitions specific to a company and entity type. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Unique identifier for the custom field definition.

definition.description: Subcollection for bank transactions imported for a specific company, awaiting reconciliation. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: bankTransactionId
params.description: Unique identifier for the bank transaction.

definition.description: Subcollection tracking uploaded bank statement files for a company. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: statementId
params.description: Unique identifier for the uploaded bank statement record.

definition.description: Subcollection managing Tally import jobs for a specific company. Each document includes denormalized 'firmId' and 'companyId' for authorization independence.

params.name: firmId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent firm.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: jobId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Tally import job.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure is designed to strictly adhere to the core principles of Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and Access Modeling, ensuring a secure, scalable, and debuggable multi-tenant SaaS accounting application.

**Authorization Independence (via Denormalization):**
Each document that represents data within a specific `Firm` or `Company` context explicitly includes the `firmId` and, where applicable, the `companyId` as direct fields. This denormalization is crucial for `Authorization Independence`. For example, a `Ledger` document stored at `/firms/{firmId}/companies/{companyId}/ledgers/{ledgerId}` will contain `ledger.firmId` and `ledger.companyId`. This eliminates the need for security rules to perform expensive and non-atomic `get()` operations on parent documents (e.g., to retrieve `companyId` from a `Company` document before authorizing access to a `Ledger`). Instead, rules can directly compare the `firmId` and `companyId` extracted from the `request.auth.uid`'s `UserProfile` (which stores the user's `firmId` and `companyId``) with the `firmId` and `companyId` present in the document itself. This design allows for atomic writes and reads and greatly simplifies rule logic, making it robust against race conditions and easier to debug.

**Support for QAPs (Queries as Authorization Policies):**
1.  **Path-Based Ownership:** The `/users/{userId}` path for `UserProfile` documents inherently supports QAPs by enforcing that `request.auth.uid` must match `{userId}`. This makes `list` operations on user profiles trivially secure, as a user can only query their own profile.
2.  **Denormalized `firmId` and `companyId`:** For all firm- and company-scoped data, the explicit inclusion of `firmId` and `companyId` in every document enables QAPs at a broader scale. Security rules will mandate that any `list` query must include `where('firmId', '==', request.auth.firmId)` and/or `where('companyId', '==', request.auth.companyId)`. The rules then merely *validate* that the query's filters match the authenticated user's access scope (derived from their `UserProfile`), rather than attempting to filter results themselves. This ensures that clients can only ever request data they are authorized to see, making `list` operations efficient and secure.
3.  **Structural Segregation:** Data is hierarchically organized (`/firms/{firmId}/companies/{companyId}/...`). This ensures that all documents within a given collection (e.g., `/firms/{firmId}/companies/{companyId}/ledgers`) share a homogeneous security posture. Rules can be written concisely for each collection, relying on the `firmId` and `companyId` within the document and path to grant access based on the user's role, thus facilitating strong QAPs.

**Access Modeling:**
*   **Private User Data:** `UserProfile` data is stored under `/users/{userId}`, directly tied to the Firebase `auth.uid`.
*   **Hierarchical Multi-Tenant Data:** All firm-specific data (e.g., `Firm` details, `Company` details, `Ledgers`, `Vouchers`, etc.) is structured under `/firms/{firmId}` and further under `/firms/{firmId}/companies/{companyId}`. This clear hierarchy provides natural scoping for multi-tenancy.
*   **DBAC (Database Access Control):** User roles (`SuperAdmin`, `FirmAdmin`, `Staff`, `ClientUser`) and their primary `firmId` and `companyId` are stored directly within their `UserProfile` document. Security rules will `get()` the user's *own* `UserProfile` (`/users/$(request.auth.uid)`) to ascertain their role and scope for authorizing access to other data within the system. This avoids custom claims and keeps role management within Firestore. SuperAdmins will have a `role` field allowing broad access, while other roles will be restricted by their associated `firmId` and `companyId` fields.

This design establishes a robust foundation for implementing fine-grained security rules, supporting efficient data retrieval, and simplifying debugging in a multi-tenant environment.
